jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Bayer India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Bayer India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bayer India:
Bayer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India!
